input.question: Show average grade progression over semesters and academic years

payload.question: Show average grade progression over semesters and academic years

output.sql:
WITH avg_by_term AS (
  SELECT
    academic_year AS academic_year,
    semester AS semester,
    AVG(grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*) AS grade_count,
    MAX(semester_order) AS semester_order
  FROM grades
  GROUP BY academic_year, semester
)
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  semester AS semester,
  COALESCE(semester_order, 0) AS semester_order,
  avg_grade AS avg_grade,
  grade_count AS grade_count,
  (CAST(SUBSTR(academic_year, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) * 10 + COALESCE(semester_order, 0)) AS time_index,
  (academic_year || ' ' || semester) AS term_label
FROM avg_by_term
ORDER BY time_index ASC;

visualization.description: Average grade progression over semesters and academic years
visualization.title: Average Grade Progression by Term

payload.sql:
WITH avg_by_term AS (
  SELECT
    academic_year AS academic_year,
    semester AS semester,
    AVG(grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*) AS grade_count,
    MAX(semester_order) AS semester_order
  FROM grades
  GROUP BY academic_year, semester
)
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  semester AS semester,
  COALESCE(semester_order, 0) AS semester_order,
  avg_grade AS avg_grade,
  grade_count AS grade_count,
  (CAST(SUBSTR(academic_year, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) * 10 + COALESCE(semester_order, 0)) AS time_index,
  (academic_year || ' ' || semester) AS term_label
FROM avg_by_term
ORDER BY time_index ASC;
